positive: Minimalist geometric pattern featuring stylized tropical flora and fauna, such as abstract hummingbirds, monstera leaves, and hibiscus flowers, arranged in a repeating, balanced mosaic pattern. The style is clean, linework illustration combined with subtle watercolor wash elements, executed in deep indigo blue, burnt orange, and creamy off-white. The composition must be highly symmetrical, designed as a continuous, repeating wallpaper-style print suitable for apparel. Strong contrast is key, emphasizing the silhouettes and clean edges of the botanical elements. Flat lay, vector art quality, maximalist but orderly composition, bright natural daylight.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, poor anatomy, extra limbs, illegible, realistic photograph, graffiti, messy, grunge, dirty, messy background, photorealism
